body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-41018", "cvss": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-532", "name": "Insertion of Sensitive Information into Log File"}], "description": "The Elasticsearch logging provider, when configured with a `host` URL that embeds credentials (for example `https://user:password@server.example.com:9200`), wrote the full host URL — including the embedded credentials — into task logs. Any user with task-log read permission could harvest the backend credentials. Users are advised to upgrade to `apache-airflow-providers-elasticsearch` 6.5.3 or later and, as a defense-in-depth measure, configure the backend credentials via a secret backend rather than embedding them in the `[elasticsearch] host` URL.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.0041, "percentile": 0.32574}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-g3jr-4jrm-jvqv", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-15T17:26:58Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-g3jr-4jrm-jvqv", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-g3jr-4jrm-jvqv"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-41018"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-11T09:16:25Z", "published_at": "2026-05-11T09:30:32Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41018", "https://github.com/apache/airflow/pull/65349", "https://lists.apache.org/thread/wz5l58drprmwlv6jxnq466x24jqbbhp7", "http://www.openwall.com/lists/oss-security/2026/05/10/3", "https://github.com/apache/airflow/commit/f9244064016a8db45277efb0c24808e663b233f3", "https://github.com/pypa/advisory-database/tree/main/vulns/apache-airflow-providers-elasticsearch/PYSEC-2026-22.yaml", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-g3jr-4jrm-jvqv"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/apache/airflow", "summary": "Apache Airflow Providers Elasticsearch: Elasticsearch task-log handlers leak credentials embedded in the host URL", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-05T14:14:49Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-g3jr-4jrm-jvqv", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "6.5.3", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "apache-airflow-providers-elasticsearch"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 6.5.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Apache Airflow Providers Elasticsearch: Elasticsearch task-log handlers leak credentials embedded in the host URL
